name: Pivot 3D Chamber 2-Pack
summary: Pivot's 2-Pack of quick-release 3D Chambers ensures that you are prepared for any unexpected situations.
description: Pivot's 2-Pack of quick-release 3D Chambers ensures that you are prepared for any unexpected situations. Simply preload the chambers before starting your adventure, and when needed, easily swap in a new one. With Pivot's advanced algorithm, you can expect consistent temperatures, satisfying vapour, and exceptional flavour with every use. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
